top_signals.title: Ukraine builds cheap alternative to Patriot missiles
top_signals.summary: Arms maker Fire Point says it has successfully tested surface-to-air projectiles
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ECB moved to rein in Revolut’s ‘self-guided missiles’ in Europe
top_signals.summary: Europe’s most valuable fintech was ordered to address ‘deficiencies’ in oversight amid a rapid product rollout
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Anthropic Releases New Mythos-Like Model Ahead of IPO | The Opening Trade 6/10/2026
top_signals.summary:
Anthropic has released its latest Mythos model, Fable 5, though with one major caveat. The AI will reportedly be blocked from responding to queries related to cybersecurity and biology. It comes as the company races to IPO, along with rivals SpaceX and OpenAI.

The Opening Trade has everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. With analysis you won't find anywhere else, we break down the biggest stories of the day and speak to top guests who have skin in the game. Hosted by Anna Edwards and Tom Mackenzie. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: EU proposes ban on 11 crypto platforms in Russia sanctions push
top_signals.summary: The proposed measures would ban transactions on 11 crypto platforms and expand sanctions targeting networks accused of helping Russia evade restrictions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Apollo and Blackstone’s Large Lending Model
top_signals.summary: The private capital groups have finalised a complex $35bn deal that will help finance Anthropic’s growth plans

top_signals.title: Bill Gates to face questions about Jeffrey Epstein from House Oversight panel
top_signals.summary: Gates reportedly prepared for his testimony with the help of Jake Greenberg, who previously was the Oversight committee's chief investigations counsel.
